query: SELECT openingName, openingVariation, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM puzzles WHERE openingName LIKE '%Sicilian%' GROUP BY openingName, openingVariation ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT openingName, openingVariation, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM puzzles WHERE openingName LIKE '%Sicilian%' GROUP BY openingName, openingVariation ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;
